records.m_Talk_ENG: Girls, watch your step. It's dark, so you might trip and fall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Girls, watch your step. It's dark, so you might trip and fall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Girls, watch your step. It's dark, so you might trip and fall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's really eerie here... Are you sure this is okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's really eerie here... Are you sure this is okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's really eerie here... Are you sure this is okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's nothing to worry about. If there are any monsters around here, my drone will detect them all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's nothing to worry about. If there are any monsters around here, my drone will detect them all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's nothing to worry about. If there are any monsters around here, my drone will detect them all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After numerous modifications, it's now 86% perfect!
records.m_Talk_DEU: After numerous modifications, it's now 86% perfect!
records.m_Talk_FRA: After numerous modifications, it's now 86% perfect!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-isn't that percentage a little iffy...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-isn't that percentage a little iffy...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-isn't that percentage a little iffy...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry about it. You're the strongest out of all of us, so you should act braver.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry about it. You're the strongest out of all of us, so you should act braver.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry about it. You're the strongest out of all of us, so you should act braver.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not going to meet the best hero looking all scared, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not going to meet the best hero looking all scared, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not going to meet the best hero looking all scared, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. If anything happens, I'll save you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. If anything happens, I'll save you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. If anything happens, I'll save you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although nothing will really happen because it's just a simulation, ehehe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although nothing will really happen because it's just a simulation, ehehe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although nothing will really happen because it's just a simulation, ehehe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think there's a monster that can't be detected. Girls, let's back off!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think there's a monster that can't be detected. Girls, let's back off!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think there's a monster that can't be detected. Girls, let's back off!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I'll fight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I'll fight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I'll fight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haaaaa!!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haaaaa!!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haaaaa!!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...? I was wondering who was struggling over here. It's you girls?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...? I was wondering who was struggling over here. It's you girls?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...? I was wondering who was struggling over here. It's you girls?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you'll need the best ranker to help you out, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess you'll need the best ranker to help you out, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess you'll need the best ranker to help you out, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! It's Naielle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! It's Naielle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! It's Naielle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yo! Long time no see, Naielle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yo! Long time no see, Naielle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yo! Long time no see, Naielle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you really a top ranker now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you really a top ranker now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you really a top ranker now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Of course! You're witnessing Counters Legacy's rank no. 2! Naielle Bluesteel!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Of course! You're witnessing Counters Legacy's rank no. 2! Naielle Bluesteel!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Of course! You're witnessing Counters Legacy's rank no. 2! Naielle Bluesteel!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why are you all here? Are you still looking for that best hero?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why are you all here? Are you still looking for that best hero?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why are you all here? Are you still looking for that best hero?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! Because we're the trio that never gives up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! Because we're the trio that never gives up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! Because we're the trio that never gives up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right! Do you remember the promise you made, Naielle?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right! Do you remember the promise you made, Naielle?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right! Do you remember the promise you made, Naielle?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you'd help us if we helped you with the HRT Berry quest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you'd help us if we helped you with the HRT Berry quest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you'd help us if we helped you with the HRT Berry quest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I said that I'd help if you contributed. But you all did nothing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I said that I'd help if you contributed. But you all did nothing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I said that I'd help if you contributed. But you all did nothing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aww, seriously?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aww, seriously?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aww, seriously?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cheapskate! You'll always just be ranked 2nd!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cheapskate! You'll always just be ranked 2nd!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cheapskate! You'll always just be ranked 2nd!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's not fair.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's not fair.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's not fair.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it! You think it's easy reaching rank 2?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it! You think it's easy reaching rank 2?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it! You think it's easy reaching rank 2?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, did you get any more information about this hero since then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, did you get any more information about this hero since then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, did you get any more information about this hero since then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* It's too reckless, then. We don't even know if this person is here in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* It's too reckless, then. We don't even know if this person is here in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* It's too reckless, then. We don't even know if this person is here in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said that he was acclaimed by the Chairwoman, right? Then just go ask her!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said that he was acclaimed by the Chairwoman, right? Then just go ask her!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said that he was acclaimed by the Chairwoman, right? Then just go ask her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've asked several times, but she never gave us an answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've asked several times, but she never gave us an answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've asked several times, but she never gave us an answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Girls, let's just go ask the Chairwoman agai
8g Huh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Girls, let's just go ask the Chairwoman agai
8g Huh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Girls, let's just go ask the Chairwoman agai
8g Huh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When did the monsters get so close? My drone has an 86% detection rate...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When did the monsters get so close? My drone has an 86% detection rate...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When did the monsters get so close? My drone has an 86% detection rate...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of vague number is that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of vague number is that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of vague number is that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stand back. I'll show you what being ranked 2nd looks like!
